name_cn:
Dior Groove🔆 20 Handbag "Small Blue Cloth"
This Dior Groove 20 handbag is a new addition to the Fall/Winter 2024 collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from blue Oblique printed fabric, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is adorned with a Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, making it unique. It opens with a zippered lock featuring a charm key. The spacious compartment includes a slip pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. With a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Zippered closure with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key pouch with the Christian Dior Paris logo and vintage gold-finish metal stars, comes with a key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal slip pocket
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
